gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/153)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/153)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ كَثْرَةُ أَكْلِ الْبَيْضِ تَزِيدُ فِي الْوَلَدِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Musa Bin Bakr who said,
‘I heard Abu Al Hassan<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Frequenting the eating of the eggs increases in the births (children)’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn Hassan from Musa ibn Bakr who has said the following: “I once heard abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘Eating egg often increases the number of one’s children.’”
